events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today, born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Ringo moment, on or off the drums?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday, born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th to the legendary Brian May! From stadium anthems to astrophysics, what an incredible life. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today, born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Happy Birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. Which Stones track always gets you moving?

events.title: MTV launched in the US
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched in the United States, revolutionising music television with its first video, The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: I Want My MTV
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the game. Remember the first time you saw a music video on TV? The Buggles certainly had something to say about it!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was officially released on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment for Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Remember when Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'? That album defined a generation. What's your go-to track from their debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining event of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969, bringing '3 Days of Peace & Music' to half a million people.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in music history. Which artist from the lineup would you have loved to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legend live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tribute to Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot on September 7, 1996, and died six days later on September 13.

angles.name: Legacy of Pac
angles.copy: Today we remember the incredible talent and lasting impact of Tupac Shakur. His words still resonate decades later. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Crossing the Road
angles.copy: The album cover that launched a thousand theories! Celebrating The Beatles' masterpiece 'Abbey Road'. Which track is your absolute favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today, born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! A true rock legend with a voice like no other. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo artist Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today, born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that pure rock 'n' roll energy. What's your top track from the man himself?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK re-release anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was re-released as a single in the UK on October 24, 1975, to promote his 'Shaved Fish' compilation album.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: More than just a song, it's a message. Remembering the 1975 UK re-release of John Lennon's 'Imagine'. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple iPod anniversary
events.blurb: The revolutionary first-generation Apple iPod was announced on October 23, 2001, and released on November 10, 2001, forever changing how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years since Apple introduced the iPod and put '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Did you own one of the originals? What was the first album you loaded on it?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Our favourite secret agent has given us some incredible theme tunes over the decades. Which Bond song is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon, born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the visionary John Lennon, who would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite John Lennon song?
